---
title: "Tom Stafford - Wall Street Journal cover"
source: "https://tomstafford.sites.sheffield.ac.uk/news/wall-street-journal-cover"
date: "2012-09-06"
---

# Wall Street Journal cover 

[Back to News](/news)

6 September 2012

The 'Cognitive Science Safari' I did in Berlin for the BMW Guggenheim lab got onto the cover of the Wall Street Journal -- see it large here (I'm at the bottom). On the website there's a video of what we got up to.

![](images/6c89b1b5.jpg)
